title: Azure Blob Storage Permission Issue Blocking File Uploads
symptoms: Azure Blob Storage returning AuthorizationPermissionMismatch on PUT operations
SAS token validation showing read-only permissions (missing write)
File upload API returning 403 Forbidden to all upload requests
GET operations (file downloads) still working normally
Azure Storage Explorer confirming write operations blocked with current SAS
root_cause: SAS token regenerated during routine key rotation with read-only permissions instead of required read-write permissions, blocking all write operations to blob storage
resolution: Regenerated SAS token with correct read-write-list permissions, updated the upload service configuration with new token, and verified upload functionality restored
preventive_actions: Implement SAS token permission validation in rotation automation
Use managed identity instead of SAS tokens for service authentication
Add write permission verification test after token rotation
Create SAS token rotation runbook with permission checklist
Implement automated upload smoke test after credential changes

timeline.event: SAS token rotation completes with incorrect permissions
File upload requests begin failing with permission errors
Lisa Park investigates, reviews recent key rotation
SAS token permissions identified as read-only
New SAS token generated with read-write-list permissions
Upload service configuration updated with new token
File uploads functioning normally, incident resolved

embedding_summary: Azure Blob Storage file uploads blocked for 30 minutes after SAS token rotation generated read-only token instead of read-write. 1,400 upload attempts failed for EU users. Resolved by regenerating SAS token with correct permissions and updating service configuration.
